page_title: Chapter 74: The Dwarf in the Flask
text:
Synopsis

No information available.

Chapter Notes

When she meets Colonel Mustang in the cafeteria, the scar Lt. Hawkeye received from the Homunculus Pride is still visible.
Though a transliteration error causes Selim's surname to be transcribed as "Bladley" in Roy's decryption of Hawkeye's code, (suggesting that Rebecca had been read "Lebecca") the Viz publication altered the message to include the correct letter and also added an "Andrew" to Hawkeye's list so that the finished message would read "Selim Bradley is A Homunculus".
